ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Continued To Feb-14-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Demian L. Oksenendler, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ronda A. Rigamonti, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Michael Gragnani.
Default was entered against defendant on February 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 28, 2010.
Cross-Complaint of a Michael Gragnani was dismissed with prejudice on February 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ronad A. Rigamonti, and against the Defaulted Defendant Michael Gragnani as follows:

General Damages - $10,250,000.00.
Special Damages - $6,276,396.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $230,564.08.
Costs - $11,549.29, for a total judgment in the amount of $16,768,509.08.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
